variables.name: vpc_id
variables.description: ID of the VPC where RDS will be deployed.

variables.name: subnet_ids
variables.description: Comma-separated private subnet IDs for the DB subnet group.

variables.name: db_name
variables.description: Name of the initial database to create.

variables.name: multi_az
variables.description: Enable Multi-AZ deployment for high availability.

variables.name: backup_retention_days
variables.description: Number of days to retain automated backups (0 disables backups).

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g. dev, staging, prod).
